notes: Costs are local estimates from token counts in Codex session JSONL, not official billing records.
Regular input, cache reads, cache writes, and output are billed with their corresponding per-million-token rates when those usage fields are available.
GPT-5.6 cache writes are billed at cache_write_input_per_1m. When Codex session JSONL omits cache_write_tokens, the displayed estimate treats those unknown tokens at the regular input rate.
Long context rates apply only to model entries that define a long_context block. The official GPT-5.6 pricing table currently has no long-context surcharge tier.
